title: Senior Financial Analyst - LIC - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - LIC - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, LIC in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!
